project: Sigil & Script - Multi-Tenant Interactive Invitation Platform

ADMIN.description: Global application controller and metrics dashboard.

HOST.description: The invitation designer and real-time analytics tracker.

capabilities: Dynamic dynamic field RSVP form delivery

milestones.name: Database Schema & OpenAPI Route Layout
tasks: Generate rigorous Prisma/Mongoose schemas matching GuestRecord and Canvas structures

milestones.name: Dynamic Route Token Validation Engine
tasks: Implement /invite/[guest_token] router hydrating automatically via telemetry tracking backend endpoints
Establish Admin and Host interface security guards

milestones.name: Zustand Custom Design Engine & Dynamic Forms Configurator
tasks: Migrate SigilContext to isolated Zustand canvas stores
Build CSV batch processing roster systems

milestones.name: Framer Motion Envelope Mechanics & Asset Handoffs
tasks: Construct multi-phase envelope split visual timelines
Build automated sound fades and sticky performance countdown widgets

milestones.name: Telemetry Ingestion Auditing & Verification
tasks: Run end-to-end telemetry simulations for seamless status switches from PENDING to OPENED via headless test scripts

milestones.name: Secure Host Auth and Canvas Scoping
tasks: Establish User registration and Session models in PostgreSQL
Implement zero-dependency password hashing with PBKDF2 salt vectors
Scope API fetch listing, detail load, and mutations to active user sessions
